glosses.ja: 親（父または母）; 親戚

translations.de: Meine Eltern kommen heute Abend an.
translations.pt: Meus pais chegam hoje à noite.
translations.tr: Anne ve babam bu akşam geliyor.
translations.vi: Bố mẹ tôi sẽ đến tối nay.
translations.hi: मेरे माता-पिता आज रात आ रहे हैं.
translations.id: Orang tua saya datang malam ini.

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular possessor), plural form; modifies 'parents'.
Common noun (masculine plural); subject of the verb 'arrivent'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; agrees with 'parents'.
Demonstrative determiner introducing the temporal noun 'soir'.
Common noun; head of a temporal NP ('ce soir') functioning as an adverbial time complement.

translations.es: Tus padres viven cerca de aquí.
translations.de: Deine Eltern wohnen hier in der Nähe.
translations.it: I tuoi genitori abitano qui vicino.
translations.vi: Bố mẹ bạn sống gần đây.
translations.nl: Je ouders wonen hier in de buurt.
translations.hu: A szüleid itt a közelben laknak.
translations.hi: तुम्हारे माता-पिता यहीं पास में रहते हैं.
translations.el: Οι γονείς σου μένουν εδώ κοντά.
translations.id: Orang tua kamu tinggal di dekat sini.
translations.sv: Dina föräldrar bor här i närheten.
translations.ro: Părinții tăi locuiesc aproape de aici.
translations.ja: あなたの両親はこの近くに住んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular possessor), plural form; modifies 'parents'.
Common noun (masculine plural); subject of 'habitent'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; means 'to live/reside'.
Adverb functioning as a preposition-like item that selects a 'de' complement.
Contraction of the preposition 'de' with the adverb 'ici'; complement to 'près' meaning 'near here'.

sentences.target: Je montre la photo à mes parents.
sentences.reading: /ʒə mɔ̃tʁ la fɔto a me paʁɑ̃/

translations.fr: Je montre la photo à mes parents.
translations.ipa: /ʒə mɔ̃tʁ la fɔto a me paʁɑ̃/
translations.en: I'm showing the photo to my parents.
translations.es: Les muestro la foto a mis padres.
translations.de: Ich zeige meinen Eltern das Foto.
translations.it: Mostro la foto ai miei genitori.
translations.pt: Estou mostrando a foto aos meus pais.
translations.he: אני מראה את התמונה להורים שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi đang cho bố mẹ xem bức ảnh.
translations.nl: Ik laat de foto aan mijn ouders zien.
translations.hi: मैं अपने माता-पिता को फोटो दिखा रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Δείχνω τη φωτογραφία στους γονείς μου.
translations.nb: Jeg viser bildet til foreldrene mine.
translations.id: Saya menunjukkan foto kepada orang tua saya.
translations.sv: Jag visar fotot för mina föräldrar.
translations.da: Jeg viser billedet til mine forældre.
translations.ja: 両親に写真を見せています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; clitic position before the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes a direct object and an indirect object.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'photo'.
Common noun (feminine); direct object of 'montre'.
Preposition introducing the indirect object (recipient).
Possessive determiner (1st person singular possessor), plural form; modifies 'parents'.
Common noun (masculine plural); indirect object of 'montre' introduced by 'à'.

sentences.target: Nous dînons chez tes parents demain.

translations.fr: Nous dînons chez tes parents demain.
translations.en: We’re having dinner at your parents’ tomorrow.
translations.es: Mañana cenamos en casa de tus padres.
translations.de: Morgen essen wir bei deinen Eltern zu Abend.
translations.it: Domani ceniamo a casa dei tuoi genitori.
translations.ko: 우리 내일 너희 부모님 댁에서 저녁을 먹어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们明天在你父母家吃晚饭。
translations.yue: 我哋聽日去你爸媽屋企食晚飯。
translations.ru: Мы завтра ужинаем у твоих родителей.
translations.pt: Amanhã jantamos na casa dos seus pais.
translations.he: מחר אנחנו אוכלים ארוחת ערב אצל ההורים שלך.
translations.tr: Yarın anne babanın evinde akşam yemeği yiyoruz.
translations.vi: Ngày mai chúng tôi ăn tối ở nhà bố mẹ bạn.
translations.ar: غدًا نتناول العشاء في بيت والديك.
translations.nl: Morgen eten we bij jouw ouders.
translations.uk: Завтра ми вечеряємо у твоїх батьків.
translations.hi: कल हम तुम्हारे माता-पिता के घर रात का खाना खाएँगे.
translations.pl: Jutro jemy kolację u twoich rodziców.
translations.el: Αύριο τρώμε βραδινό στο σπίτι των γονιών σου.
translations.nb: I morgen spiser vi middag hos foreldrene dine.
translations.id: Besok kami makan malam di rumah orang tua kamu.
translations.sv: I morgon äter vi middag hos dina föräldrar.
translations.da: I morgen spiser vi middag hos dine forældre.
translations.ja: 明日あなたのご両親の家で夕食を食べます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; intransitive ('to dine/have dinner').
Preposition meaning 'at the home/office of'; introduces a location complement.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular possessor), plural form; modifies 'parents'.
Common noun (masculine plural); object of the preposition 'chez' indicating whose place.
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate, specifying time.
